# AI Policy File

> Free 2-minute checker that tells creators and small businesses which AI
> disclosure laws apply to them, with plain-English explanations, sample
> disclosure wording, and links to every official law text. Educational
> information, not legal advice.

## Laws covered (current as of July 2026)

- FTC Endorsement Guides AI disclosure guidance (United States, enforcement active)
- EU AI Act Article 50 transparency obligations (effective August 2, 2026)
- New York Synthetic Performer Disclosure Law S.8420-A (effective June 9, 2026)
- California B.O.T. Act SB 1001 (in force since July 1, 2019)
- California SB 942 AI Transparency Act (effective August 2, 2026)

## Pages

- [Home](https://aipolicyfile.com/): overview of all five laws with official links
- [Checker](https://aipolicyfile.com/checker): the free 8-question checker
- [About](https://aipolicyfile.com/about): why the site exists
- [Disclaimer](https://aipolicyfile.com/disclaimer): educational information, not legal advice

## Law guides (plain-English deep dives)

- [FTC AI disclosure rules](https://aipolicyfile.com/laws/ftc-ai-disclosure-rules)
- [EU AI Act Article 50](https://aipolicyfile.com/laws/eu-ai-act-article-50)
- [New York synthetic performer law](https://aipolicyfile.com/laws/new-york-synthetic-performer-law)
- [California B.O.T. Act](https://aipolicyfile.com/laws/california-bot-disclosure-law)
- [California SB 942](https://aipolicyfile.com/laws/california-sb-942)

## Common questions, answered

- [Do I have to disclose AI-generated content?](https://aipolicyfile.com/answers/do-i-have-to-disclose-ai-generated-content)
- [AI disclosure rules for influencers and sponsored content](https://aipolicyfile.com/answers/ai-disclosure-rules-for-sponsored-content-influencers)
- [EU AI Act Article 50 checklist for small businesses](https://aipolicyfile.com/answers/eu-ai-act-article-50-checklist-small-business)
- [Do chatbots have to say they are bots?](https://aipolicyfile.com/answers/do-chatbots-have-to-say-they-are-bots)
